title: Gas report - Week 7
summary:
LNG
There were numerous reports of cargoes working, a mix of FOB tenders and tentative enquiry in both basins had brokers optimistic but despite these reports rates for spot have remained flat. On the modern 2-Stroke 174cbm ships we have seen growth on all three routes though Fuel Pricing has been one of the major factors for this rise. BLNG1 Aus-Japan closed at $57,702, a rise of $1651 while BLNG2 US-Cont finished at $54,304 and US-Japan BLNG3 saw a closing price of $54,593.

children.title: LPG
children.summary: Despite the Lunar New Year celebrations, the market from the AG has seen plenty of activity. The week began slowly but picked up pace by the mid-point, rates rose for the second week in a row where Ras Tanura-Chiba BLPG1 gained $8.714 to finish at $57.714.
